flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at University of Nevada-Reno rose 12% between 2021 and 2024 ($24.7k → $27.7k).

flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at University of Nevada-Reno rose 12% between 2021 and 2024 ($8.6k → $9.6k).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at University of Nevada-Reno fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (0.8% → 0.0%).
